experiment_title: 氯化钠的物理性质观察实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="氯化钠的物理性质观察实验" goal="观察氯化钠的颜色、状态及其在水中的溶解性和温度变化" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="tweezers_1" type="tweezers" />
      <Component id="white_paper_1" type="paper" />
      <Component id="watch_glass_1" type="watch_glass" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20mL" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="thermometer_1" type="thermometer" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="NaCl" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="white_paper_1" reagent="NaCl" mass="1 g" tool="tweezers_1" id="step_0" />
      
      <Add vessel="watch_glass_1" reagent="NaCl" mass="1 g" tool="tweezers_1" id="step_1" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaCl" mass="1 g" tool="tweezers_1" id="step_2" />
      
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" id="step_4" />
      
      <Insert tool="thermometer_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="2min" id="step_6" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 观察氯化钠固体的颜色和状态，分别在白纸和表面皿上进行。
将氯化钠加入试管，量取水并加入试管，准备溶解实验。
插入温度计，等待溶解过程，观察氯化钠在水中的溶解性及温度变化。
